# Ami Steelman
> Learning systems professional, platform administrator, and independent builder.
> Turning complexity into clarity.

## About
Ami Steelman is a learning systems administrator and technology builder with 25+ years
of experience across legal technology, K-12 education, and independent software
development. She specializes in LMS/SIS administration, enterprise platform integration,
SSO/SAML configuration, AI-enabled workflow automation, and internal training program
design.

## Services
- LMS administration and platform ownership (Blackbaud, Google Workspace, SaaS platforms)
- Google Workspace consulting (IdP, SSO/SAML, integrations)
- AI literacy workshops and corporate training
- Technology change management and platform onboarding
- IT consulting for small organizations

## Notable Projects
- BOLT: AI-driven institutional knowledge base built on OpenAI APIs, processing 280+
  curriculum maps, serving 1,000+ users, reducing internal support requests by ~30%
- Heritage Hall Schedule App: Cross-platform mobile app (React Native, Firebase) published
  on App Store and Google Play
- FontSwap: Google Workspace Add-on for bulk font replacement across Slides and Docs

## Location
Edmond, Oklahoma. Available remotely.

amisteelman.com
